programme.desc: Thirty years after the defeat of the Galactic Empire, Han Solo and his young allies face a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren and the First Order.

programme.title: Mary Poppins Returns
programme.desc: Decades after her original visit, the magical nanny returns to help the Banks siblings and Michael's children through a difficult time in their lives.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: Eleven year old Riley moves to San Francisco. She and her five emotions - fear, anger, joy, disgust, sadness - struggle to cope with her new life.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: When the windshield of his commercial airplane shatters at 30,000 feet in the air, a pilot and his flight crew work to ensure the safety of the passengers and land the plane.

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Russ Cargill, the evil head of the Environmental Protection Agency intends to destroy Springfield after Homer pollutes the lake.

programme.title: Alice In Wonderland (2010)
programme.desc: Mia Wasikowska, Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter. 19-year-old Alice returns to the magical world from her childhood adventure, where she reunites with her old friends and learns of her true destiny.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: F Plus
programme.desc: Short entertainment segments present quick promos, engaging highlights and light moments designed to keep viewers entertained between programmes.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A Chinese special forces unit must rescue their fellow citizens in the country of Yewaire on the Arabian Peninsula amidst violent coup and threats from a terrorist group.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Catch all the cool promos, music, and fillers from your favorite movies and shows, streaming back-to-back! It's the perfect way to enjoy non-stop entertainment in one go.

programme.title: Cosmoball
programme.desc: After a galactic war that took place near Earth, the moon was destroyed and the planet''s poles shifted. A huge spaceship called Cosmoball'' hovers over the Earth.

programme.title: Restart The Earth
programme.desc: An accidental chemical development liberates plant intelligence, causing cities to be overrun by vegetation. A task force assembles to combat this unexpected ecological threat.

programme.title: Darkroom
programme.desc: Michelle takes a job recommended by her counselor that lands her trapped in a mansion with three psychotic siblings hell bent on purging Michelle of her sins.

programme.title: Up
programme.desc: Carl finally fulfills his lifelong dream of a great adventure. But he discovers he has a stowaway on the trip: a 9-year-old Wilderness Explorer.

programme.title: Detective Di Skeleton General
programme.desc: In SuZhou village, mysterious murders leave only white skeleton soldiers. RenJie, famed detective, unravels truth for justice.

programme.title: Planet Of The Apes
programme.desc: When astronaut Taylor's spaceship crashes on an unknown planet, he realises that it is ruled by apes more advanced than humans.

programme.title: Raya And The Last Dragon
programme.desc: Raya And The Last Dragon explores fantasy worlds, courage, and unity, delivering captivating storytelling and visually rich adventures.

programme.title: The Pacifier
programme.desc: Comedy: Vin Diesel, a Navy SEAL assigned to protect the children of an assassinated scientist is faced with 2 jobs: fighting evil while housekeeping.

programme.title: Bravestorm
programme.desc: When two families and their trusty armed robots team up, they're ready to take on an alien invasion threatening Earth. Adventure, action, and a dash of humor await!

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe'S Most Wanted
programme.desc: The movie name is yet to be announced by the channel.

programme.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
programme.desc: The Grand Budapest Hotel delivers quirky comedy, intricate plots, and visually rich storytelling, blending humor and artistic style.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand revisits themes of courage, friendship, and identity, offering family-friendly comedy and heartfelt emotional moments.

programme.title: King Of Serpant
programme.desc: In a thrilling showdown on King Serpent Island, Chen Zheng confronts Jin Laosi's snake catchers. Will he manage to save the snakes from their dangerous fate? Find out!

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: After five years of imprisonment, a thief teams up with his partner to conduct a heist in Europe. However, a French detective starts pursuing them.

programme.title: Jurassic City
programme.desc: Genetically modified dinosaurs escape; a black-ops unit must recapture them quickly.

programme.title: George And The Dragon(2004)
programme.desc: After witnessing extreme bloodshed, Knight George decides to forsake war and seek redemption. However, he is forced to get back to his old ways when he sets out to rescue King Edgar's daughter.

programme.title: Cars
programme.desc: Cars presents animated racing adventures with humor, friendship, and excitement, engaging audiences in fast-paced, lively stories.

programme.title: Cruella
programme.desc: Ambitious Estella transforms into daring Cruella, challenging fashion icon Baroness while chasing fame and revenge.

programme.title: Rio 2
programme.desc: Rio 2 revisits colorful adventures, music, and family bonds, engaging audiences with vibrant animated storytelling.

programme.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader
programme.desc: Lucy and Edmund return to Narnia with Eustace where they meet up with Prince Caspian for a trip across the sea aboard the royal ship The Dawn Treader.

programme.title: The Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: Jim and Sara are summoned to a mansion. When they discover that the place is haunted, Jim learns a truth about his family.

programme.title: Finding Dory
programme.desc: Dory has incredibly poor memory - all she remembers is that she was separated from her parents. She goes on a quest to find them.

programme.title: Disney's The Finest Hours
programme.desc: Four coast guards get caught in a deadly storm and give their all to rescue the survivors of an oil-tanker, which is split in half, trapping its crew.

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: A pushy boss forces her young assistant to marry her in order to keep her Visa status in the U.S. and avoid deportation to Canada.

programme.title: Dog
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Jackson Briggs travels with Lulu, a military dog, to the funeral of her handler. During their journey, the duo breaks laws and leaves no stone unturned in annoying each other.

programme.title: Mojin The Treasure Valley
programme.desc: Join Explorer Hu Bayi and his team as they embark on an adventurous quest to uncover Emperor Xian's tomb, battling bizarre monsters on a thrilling, mysterious island.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: When his youthful ambition leads to a tragic marriage, the all-powerful Samson embarks on a quest for vengeance that brings him into direct conflict with the Philistine army.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A skilled swordsman seeking peace is forced to use his weapon again by a rival desperate to take his place.

programme.title: Bad Connection
programme.desc: When a downtrodden young waitress buys a stolen cell phone and discovers a snuff film on it, she soon finds herself on the run from a maniacal madman who is hell-bent on getting it back.

programme.title: Cars 2
programme.desc: Cars 2 revisits high-speed racing, clever schemes, and teamwork, entertaining viewers with vibrant animation and suspenseful sequences.
